chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: In this video, we have an exercise for you to practice CSS concepts.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: The exercise is to create a responsive navigation bar using CSS Flexbox and media queries.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: The navbar should have a logo on the left and navigation links on the right.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: On mobile devices, the links should stack vertically below the logo.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: You should also add a hamburger menu icon that shows only on mobile.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: Use everything we have learned so far including flexbox, transitions, and media queries.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: Try to do this exercise on your own before watching the solution.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: This is very important practice as navigation bars are present on every website.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: Take about 30 minutes to attempt this exercise on your own.

chunks.title: Exercise 2 - Responsive Navbar with CSS
chunks.text: Pause this video now and try it yourself. I will show the solution after this.

text: In this video, we have an exercise for you to practice CSS concepts. The exercise is to create a responsive navigation bar using CSS Flexbox and media queries. The navbar should have a logo on the left and navigation links on the right. On mobile devices, the links should stack vertically below the logo. You should also add a hamburger menu icon that shows only on mobile. Use everything we have learned so far including flexbox, transitions, and media queries. Try to do this exercise on your own before watching the solution. This is very important practice as navigation bars are present on every website. Take about 30 minutes to attempt this exercise on your own. Pause this video now and try it yourself. I will show the solution after this.
